common.footer: Results are documented case evidence, not guaranteed outcomes.

home.headline: Find Nano-Gro results by problem, crop, country, evidence, and ROI.
home.lede: A searchable proof database built for rapid publication of documented agricultural cases and diagnostic lead capture.

cases.metadataDescription: Search published Nano-Gro cases by problem, crop, country, evidence level, completeness score, ROI, and result.
cases.title: Published case studies
cases.description: Only published cases are shown. Sort priority is most complete first.
cases.disclaimer: This report is based on documented field evidence. Some technical details not available in the original report were conservatively estimated by the technical team for guidance purposes and remain subject to confirmation.
cases.roiNotCalculated: ROI not calculated due to incomplete baseline data.
cases.summaryFallback: Documented Nano-Gro field case prepared for technical review.
cases.visualOnlyResult: Visual improvement documented. Quantified yield data not reported.
cases.technicalStructured: Technical details are structured for publication.
cases.relatedAvailable: related documented cases are available below.
cases.relatedFallback: Related case matching will improve as more cases are published.
cases.requestDiagnosisBody: Submit your crop, hectares, problem, and objective to receive a case-based recommendation.

technicalSheets.metadataDescription: Nano-Gro technical sheets and supporting documents prepared for agronomic and commercial review.
technicalSheets.title: Technical sheets
technicalSheets.description: Product and technical documents are preserved here as technical support material for agronomic review, case validation, and commercial follow-up.
technicalSheets.graphicTitle: How it works in the field
technicalSheets.salesUseTitle: How to use this sheet to sell
technicalSheets.salesUseBody: Use this page to explain the product with clear technical language: start with the producer's problem, then the expected plant response, then the application protocol, and finally the available evidence. Avoid guaranteed-result claims; sell with technical support, follow-up, and documented cases.

caseReport.roiNotCalculated: ROI not calculated due to incomplete baseline data.
caseReport.summaryFallback: Documented Nano-Gro field case prepared for technical review.
caseReport.visualOnlyResult: Visual improvement documented. Quantified yield data not reported.
caseReport.technicalStructured: Technical details are structured for publication.
caseReport.relatedAvailable: related documented cases are available below.
caseReport.relatedFallback: Related case matching will improve as more cases are published.
caseReport.requestDiagnosisBody: Submit your crop, hectares, problem, and objective to receive a case-based recommendation.

diagnostic.title: Get a recommendation for your crop
diagnostic.description: Tell us your current situation and a Nano-Gro specialist will help you find similar cases and a possible strategy.
diagnostic.submittedText: Review these published cases while the team prepares a recommendation.
diagnostic.formTitle: Get a recommendation for your crop
diagnostic.formSubtitle: Tell us your current situation and a Nano-Gro specialist will help you find similar cases and a possible strategy.
diagnostic.name: Name
diagnostic.comments: Tell us more about your situation
diagnostic.consent: I agree to be contacted about Nano-Gro case recommendations.

admin.importDescription: CSV import validates rows first. Valid rows can then be converted into draft cases only.
admin.name: Name
admin.publicationWarning: This case cannot be published until it has at least one evidence asset, approved testimonial, or technical validation.

caseForm.title: Title
caseForm.manualEvidenceNote: File matching is intentionally manual for this MVP. Use these references to attach photos, videos, PDFs, and documents in Evidence.

a.name: Complete
a.description: Level A: complete productive data, before and after photos, measurements, and agronomist or technical validation.

b.name: Partial with imagery
b.description: Level B: partial productive data supported by visual evidence.

c.name: Testimonial
c.description: Level C: documented testimonial with some supporting context.

d.name: Field note
d.description: Level D: anecdotal case or early field note. Useful as reference, weaker as public proof.

confidence.title: Confidence score
confidence.why: Why this case scores what it scores
confidence.disclaimer: The score reflects the documented evidence available for this case. It is not a guarantee of results.

checklist.productiveData: Measured productive data (yield, quality, or disease)

metrics.aggregateDisclaimer: Averages calculated over published cases only. Sample size is shown beside every figure. These are not guaranteed results.

seo.defaultDescription: Search documented Nano-Gro agricultural cases by problem, crop, country, evidence, and ROI.
seo.ogDescription: Documented Nano-Gro results, evidence, and diagnostic lead capture.
